name: Alejandro Olmedo
title: Intermediate Software Engineer | Backend Developer| Node.js · Cloud
summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable full-stack web applications. Proven track record in React, Node.js, and cloud-native architectures on AWS and GCP. Passionate about clean code, developer experience, and building systems that scale. Skilled collaborator with cross-functional teams in fast-paced, agile environments.

bullets: Reduced API response time by 40% by migrating monolithic services to a Node.js microservices architecture deployed on AWS ECS.
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured code reviews, pair programming sessions, and bi-weekly 1:1s.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Terraform, cutting deployment time from 45 minutes to under 8 minutes.
Participated in the complete development cycle of a business to business software used by a major telecommunications company in Canada to manage their internal contractual relationships.
Developed on a microservices event driven architecture using GCP Pub/Sub messaging service and Firestore as a main database
Implemented a cache layer using Redis to greatly improve the performance of the APIs taking into account backups and scaling considerations
Continously worked on improving the cloud infrastructure using Terraform and adjusting the Kubernetes configuration to better suit the load of the application

certifications.name: Google Cloud Certified Associate Cloud Engineer
